How many of the numbers in the list$$\left\{25.34816, \;\; 84.3695, \;\; 2.54527\cdot 10, \;\; 894.54332, \;\; \frac{234.572}{100}, \;\; \frac{162}{1000}\right\}$$are rounded up when rounded to the nearest thousandth?
}

\textbf{Answer:} First simplify each number to a decimal:\begin{align*}
25.34816 &= 25.34816\\
84.3695 &= 84.3695\\
2.54527\cdot 10 &= 25.4527\\
894.54332 &= 894.54332\\
\frac{234.572}{100} &= 2.34572\\
\frac{162}{1000} &= 0.162.
\end{align*}Next, see which numbers have a ten-thousandth digit greater than or equal to 5.\begin{align*}
25&.34816 \quad\text{(no)}\\
84&.3695 \quad\text{(yes)}\\
25&.4527 \quad\text{(yes)}\\
894&.54332 \quad\text{(no)}\\
2&.34572 \quad\text{(yes)}\\
0&.162 \quad\text{(no)}.
\end{align*}So $\boxed 3$ of the numbers are rounded up when rounded to the nearest thousandth.
